heading: Authority for construction reserve funds
label: 53302 Authority for construction reserve funds

children.heading: .—General Authority
children.label: a .—General Authority
children.text: An eligible person under may establish a construction reserve fund for the construction, reconstruction, reconditioning, or acquisition of a new vessel or for other purposes authorized by this chapter.section 53303 of this title

children.heading: .—Application of Certain Laws and Regulations
children.label: b .—Application of Certain Laws and Regulations
children.text: The fund shall be established, maintained, expended, and used as provided by this chapter and regulations prescribed jointly by the Secretary of Transportation and the Secretary of the Treasury.
